summary: Frontend testing of Paint Shop comprehensive upgrade. ALL TESTS PASS. Color bleed bug on truck_04 is FIXED - all 6 truck models now show color applied only to truck body with black background remaining intact. ColorWheel has no React setState warnings. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TruckCanvas implementation with mix-blend-mode: multiply is working correctly for all 6 truck models
truck_04.png was reprocessed and now works correctly with the color overlay technique
ColorWheel component has no React setState warnings - the previous warning has been fixed
Hero image on landing page loads in 0.55s with proper fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager' attributes
test_credentials: No authentication required for Paint Shop features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Paint Shop features verified working. Color bleed bug on truck_04 is FIXED. No React warnings. Landing page hero loads fast.

COLOR_BLEED_TEST.details: ALL 6 trucks tested with vivid red #CE2029 - background stays BLACK on all models including previously failing truck_04

truck_01_Classic_Step_Van.details: Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

truck_02_Modern_Sprinter_Van.details: Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

truck_03_Large_Box_Truck.details: Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

truck_04_Compact_Transit_Van.details: PREVIOUSLY FAILING - NOW FIXED. Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

truck_05_Retro_Airstream.details: Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

truck_06_Open_Air_Trailer.details: Color applied to truck body only, black background intact

Color_Wheel_Hue_Ring.details: Clicking/dragging on hue ring changes hue in real-time

Color_Wheel_SV_Square.details: Clicking/dragging on SV square changes saturation and brightness

Color_Wheel_HEX_Input.details: Typing #FF0000 updates truck to red immediately

Preset_Palettes.details: All 6 palettes work: Classic Fleet, Copper & Steel, Street Food, Coastal, Luxury, Neon City

Finish_Types.details: All 7 finishes work: Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome, Enamel, Satin, Pearl

Two_Tone_Toggle.details: Toggle enables secondary color selection and split patterns visible

Text_Tab.details: Business name appears on truck with font/color/size options

Extras_Tab.details: All 4 extras work: Awning, LED Underglow, Roof Signage, Racing Stripe

Reset_Button.details: Clears design to defaults (#FFFFFF), shows 'Design reset to defaults' toast

Save_Button.details: Saves design successfully, shows 'Design saved successfully!' toast

State_Persistence.details: Color persists when switching between truck models

Landing_Page_Hero.details: Hero image loads in 0.55 seconds (target: <1s). Has fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager'

Console_Errors.details: No React setState warnings. Only 401 errors from unauthenticated API calls (expected)

Button_Hover_States.details: All buttons have visible hover/active states
